items.title: Point of attachment of the section line with view

attachmentPoints.description: Array of attachment points ( total upto 4 points ) on the view

items.title: Jog point of the section line

joggedSectionLinePoints.description: Optional array of jog points ( total upto 8 points ) defining the jogged section line, with the first and last points representing the start and end of the section line, respectively

sectionLineLogicalId.description: Logical id of the section line in drawing

sectionLineAliasLogicalId.description: Alias for logical id for the section line

sectionLabelStartPosition.description: Position of the section start label

sectionLabelEndPosition.description: Position of the section end label

viewDirection.description: Direction of the section arrows, controlling which side of the cut is viewed, forward or reverse by default

showOffsetCutlines.description: Indicates whether to show offset cutlines for the section view

showCutGeometry.description: Displays only the cut geometry (no depth). Cannot be true simultaneously with sectionDepth

cutAngle.description: Angle defining an angular section cut in degrees. Positive values rotate clockwise and negative values rotate counterclockwise

isCutAngleEnabled.description: Indicates whether the cut angle is enabled

cutFromSection.description: Indicates whether the section is created from an existing section view instead of a base view

allOf.description: Ensures showCutGeometry and sectionDepth are not both present.
